name: LP Retargeting - Get Bath Prospects for Bath Direct Mail

content.query:
SELECT
case 
    when [Phone] is not null then '+1'+Phone
    else [Phone]
end as [phone_id]
,[Email] as [email_id]
,HASHBYTES ( 'MD5', [Email] )  as email_md5hash
,HASHBYTES ( 'SHA2_256', [Email] )  as email_sha256hash
,[FirstName] as first_name
,[LastName] as last_name
,[Address1] as address1
,[Address2] as address2
,[City] as city
,[State] as [state]
,[Zip] as zip
,[Zip4] as zip4
,[FirstName]+' '+[LastName] as full_name
,case 
    when [Phone] is not null then '+1'+Phone
    else [Phone]
end as [phone]
,[Email] as [email]
,'windows' as product
,EntryDate as entry_date
,[EverSet] as ever_set
,[EverConfirmed] as ever_confirmed
,[EverIssued] as ever_issued
,[EverNetIssued] as ever_net_issued
,[EverSat] as ever_sat
,[Sold] as sold
,cast(getdate() as DATE) as bulk_upload_date
,'' as division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_TCT_ClientLeads]
 where 
EntryDate >= '2023-01-01'
and (Email is not null or Phone is not null)
and ClientID not in 
 (
     'gn07db','i417db','f199db','yy72db','d453db','v3v3db','a5b5db','zz99db'
 )
 and productid IN
 (
    SELECT 
    [ProductID]
    FROM [RDM].[REF_PROSPECTING_PRODUCTID_MAPPING]
    where ProductCategory='Bath'
 )
 and Zip in
 (
    SELECT 
    [ZipCode]
    FROM [RDM].[REF_PRODUCT_ZIP_CODES]
    WHERE
    Product = 'Bath'
    and ZipCode in 
    (
        select distinct
        ZipCode
        from EDW.DIM_BRANCH_ZIP 
        where 
        ProductGroupID in 
        (
            'HSI-BAT'
            ,'PBC-SHO'
            ,'RTW-KOH'
            ,'SWR-BRem'
        )
        and BranchID not in
        (
            'SWR-Hou'
            ,'SWR-HBath'
            ,'SWR-ARK'
        )
    )
 )
 order by [EntryDate] asc

/*
select *  
FROM [RDM].[REF_PRODUCT_ZIP_CODES]
*/
